zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bagot於大約1400年出生在英國斯塔福爾武托希特時，她的父親John Bagot48歲，母親Beatrice Mallory44歲。她和Henry Knyveton至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bagot于大约1400年出生在英国斯塔福爾武托希特时，她的父亲John Bagot48岁，母亲Beatrice Mallory44岁。她和Henry Knyveton至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Bagot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Baggett   (see also   Baggott  ), from a pet form of   Bagg   2.

variants.name: Baggett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Norman personal name Bagot, a diminutive of ancient Germanic Bago, from the root bag- ‘to fight’. Compare Bagg 2.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bagot was born about 1400, in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, her father, John Bagot, was 48 and her mother, Beatrice Mallory, was 44. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Henry Knyveton. She died in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bagot est née environ 1400, à Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Bagot, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Mallory, avait 44 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Henry Knyveton. Elle est décédée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Bagot um 1400 in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bagot 48 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Mallory 44. Sie hatte mit Henry Knyveton mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bagot è nata il circa 1400 nel Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, John Bagot, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Mallory, aveva 44 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Henry Knyveton. Morì nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bagotが約1400年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウットオクセターで生まれた時，父John Bagotは48歳，母Beatrice Malloryは44歳であった。彼女はHenry Knyvetonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bagot(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 스태퍼드실르 우토세터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bagot(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Mallory(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 Henry Knyveton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bagot nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bagot, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Mallory, tinha 44 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Henry Knyveton. Ela faleceu em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bagot родилась около 1400 г. в местности уттоксетир, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bagot было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Mallory, 44. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Henry Knyveton. Она умерла в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Bagot nació aproximadamente 1400, en Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Bagot, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Beatrice Mallory, tenía 44 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Henry Knyveton. Murió en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
